description: User manually triggers dotfiles commit+push in Claude sessions even though a cron-based sync agent already exists
Kindle USB detection fix (udev rule) needed to be applied twice because the first attempt did not persist across reboots
User manually asks to git-pull-then-build the artcraft project each time they want to run it, with no build script or alias
After pushing changes to autodoro, user must manually reload the systemd service for changes to take effect
User frequently asks Claude to commit and push changes as a manual request across many projects and sessions
